title: Tom Smith Boxed Christmas Cards Pack - 15 Luxury Xmas Cards with Envelopes and Seals - Festive Shopfront Designs - Recycled Eco Friendly Christmas Card Set
features: Spread Christmas Cheer - Share festive greetings with these Tom Smith boxed Christmas cards, perfect Xmas cards for family members, friends, neighbours and colleagues during the holiday season.
Quality Seasons Greetings - Each Christmas card multipack includes 15 luxury Christmas cards with envelopes and seals, giving you premium greeting cards that make a lasting impression.
Seasonal Designs - Includes two shopfront Christmas card designs with coordinating artwork, each card printed inside with the message 'Have a very merry Christmas and a wonderful New Year'.
Traditional Card Size - At 155 x 125mm these are UK letter size Christmas cards, helping you reduce mailing costs while still leaving plenty of space for your personalised seasonal message.

Eco Friendly Cards - Made from recyclable FSC certified card and produced in partnership with the Woodland Trust, these recyclable Christmas cards support sustainable forests for a greener festive season.
description: Make your Christmas greetings feel extra special with this Tom Smith Christmas cards pack, a luxury Xmas cards set designed for family, friends and colleagues. Each box contains 15 cards in two coordinating designs, complete with matching envelopes and decorative 'Merry Christmas' seals, giving you an organised way to cover all your seasonal correspondence. These assorted Christmas cards are printed on quality card with a luxury finish that feels special to receive. At 155 x 125mm they are standard UK letter size cards, keeping postage costs manageable while still leaving plenty of space for your handwritten notes. The practical format means you can post thoughtful greetings to close family or send multiple Christmas greetings cards affordably across your list. With two festive designs in every pack, you can select the artwork and greeting that best fits each recipient. Across the Tom Smith Christmas card range you'll find traditional scenes, contemporary styles and novelty designs, giving you the flexibility to choose the right message for grandparents, children, colleagues or friends. Having 15 cards in one box ensures you are prepared throughout December, with enough to cover family and friends from A Single set. All Tom Smith cards are recyclable and FSC certified, making them an eco friendly Christmas cards pack that supports sustainable forestry. Produced in partnership with the Woodland Trust, every purchase contributes to a greener Christmas tradition without compromising on quality.
